signedCommit.description: A signed commit over the current state of a permissioned repo.

hash.description: sha256 digest of the LtHash state (32 bytes).

ikm.description: Per-commit input keying material (32 random bytes)

sig.description: Signature over ctx by the user's atproto signing key. Does not cover the repo hash.

mac.description: HMAC-SHA256 over hash, keyed by HKDF-SHA256(ikm, info=ctx). Binds the repo hash to this commit's context.

rev.description: Commit revision (TID), also bound into ctx.
